channel.title: downloads on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in downloads on Wayne Cater

item.title: Typo The Game
item.description: When my kids were younger I created a Javascript based game to make learning and practicing typing fun. It was not as cool and full featured as this version below in Swift language. Typo the game runs on MacOS Sierra through Tahoe; It is free to download without needing to give out your email or other info. You can see it in action below. The video does not go into all the of the features.

item.title: Download Free Colorsheets
item.description: You can download the following items for FREE! You don’t have to purchase my book, Looking For Friends In My Backyard, in order to enjoy some colorsheets. I created these based on the artwork from the book. Simply click the image of the sheet, or sheets, you wish to download and print. Enjoy!!! Note: When you click one of the images to download, it will open in a new tab!
